CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. From page 2 of the HUD-1 Settlement Statement -Section 900. and 1000. Includes days of interest, days of taxes and any insurance payment.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: From page 2 of the HUD-1 Settlement Statement -Section 900. and 1000. Includes days of interest, days of taxes and any insurance payment.
CustomField.label: Pre-Paids/Reserves
